verdict_reason: The engineering layer preserves the verse's PIVOT character and the layered closing condition (niścalā + acalā). The Sanskrit terms are preserved in the engineering body. The yogam avāpsyasi grammar is named explicitly ('THEN you will attain yoga'). The analog operationalizes the closing condition without flattening it to 'don't change your sprint plan' — the falsifiability clause requires that the engineer DOES adopt new patterns when situationally warranted. The verse's metaphysical floor (samādhi as 'in the Self' for Shankara, eka-vṛtti for Ramanuja, full Kṛṣṇa-consciousness for Prabhupada) is recorded in the source pack and not collapsed into engineering practice. Pass.
